utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 items. Now check if each is fully specified with required details. (1) health_coverage: includes plan name, description, deductible, limit, pre-existing condition info, cost, and currency — fully specified. (2) property_coverage: includes coverage description and currency, but missing explicit cost. The format requires 'with costs', so it’s incomplete. (3) travel_coverage: includes coverage description and currency, but no cost — also incomplete. (4) additional_services: lists enhancements but no costs — incomplete. (5) total_budget: includes monthly and annual costs with currency — fully specified. Therefore, 2 items (health_coverage, total_budget) are fully specified out of 5 total.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three main components: (1) health_coverage with the plan name 'LifeFirst Standard Plan2', which is most closely matched to 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' in the ground-truth dataset (typo or variant, rating 9 for both physical and mental health combined); (2) property_coverage described as 'Home and electronics coverage', which corresponds to 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' under property_protection (rating 9); and (3) travel_coverage described as 'Global travel insurance with medical evacuation, trip cancellation, baggage protection, travel delay compensation, and adventure sports coverage', which matches 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under travel_insurance (rating 9). Additional services such as wellness_programs, telemedicine, global assistance, and specialized_rescue_services correspond to 'Wellness Programs' (rating 3), 'Telemedicine Services' (rating 8), and 'Adventure Travel Coverage' (rating 10), respectively. Multilingual_support and extended_international_stay are not rated separately in the ground-truth data.
